headline: Five Below Stock Can't Stop Climbing
summary: Shares of discount retailer Five Below soared Thursday, a day after the company reported strong sales growth and offered up guidance that topped Wall Street's expectations.

headline: Why You Might Consider an Investment in Dollar Tree Today
summary: This week, Dollar Tree reported strong quarterly earnings and a changing customer mix.

headline: Dollar Tree's Pricing Adjustments Are Generating Revenue Growth
summary: Dollar Tree (DLTR) is shifting to a mixed-price strategy, boosting margins and appealing to wealthier, bulk-buying shoppers.

raw.headline: Dollar Tree's Pricing Adjustments Are Generating Revenue Growth
